key.name: toggle-overlay
key.summary: Keyboard shortcut to show or hide the drawing layer
key.description: Default uses Alt to avoid clashes with Super+Shift+A on some distros. Recompile schemas after upgrades; reset the key if the shortcut stops working.

key.name: dock-x
key.summary: Dock horizontal offset inside the overlay (pixels)

key.name: dock-y
key.summary: Dock vertical offset inside the overlay (pixels)

key.name: movement-sync
key.description: When enabled and consent is given, the extension may run the native ROI matcher (bounded rate) to translate ink.

key.name: movement-consent-roi
key.description: Allow capturing small greyscale regions for motion estimation. No full-screen capture without this consent.

key.name: movement-max-hz
key.summary: Maximum motion matcher invocations per second
